label: ← Back to CRM
expected_behavior: Routes the SPA to the CRM/pipeline view via goTo('crm').

label: ＋ Upload
expected_behavior: Calls openUploadDoc() which sets #docUploadArea display:block to reveal the inline Add-Document upload form.

label: All (24)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('all') shows every .tl-category section and marks this filter button active.
notes: One of 6 category-filter pills; default active.

label: ⚡ Generators (4)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('generators') shows only the data-cat=generators category and hides the others.

label: 🛡️ Insurance (5)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('insurance') shows only the data-cat=insurance category.

label: 📝 Contracts (5)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('contracts') shows only the data-cat=contracts category.

label: 📂 Leave-Behinds (5)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('leave_behind') shows only the data-cat=leave_behind category.

label: 📣 Marketing (5)
expected_behavior: tlFilterCat('marketing') shows only the data-cat=marketing category.

label: Generators (category header)
expected_behavior: tlToggleCat(headerEl) collapses/expands the category body and rotates the chevron.
notes: Collapsible-section header; representative of 5 identical headers (one per category).

label: Proposal / Estimate
expected_behavior: docgen delegate lazy-loads the docgen bundle then calls NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('proposal') — opens the fill modal prefilled from CRM, then generates a branded proposal with tiered pricing + 2 required signers (homeowner, rep).

label: Invoice
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('invoice') — generates a professional invoice (renderInvoice) with line items, payment methods, balance due.

label: Warranty Certificate
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('warranty_certificate') — generates a tiered (Good/Better/Best) warranty certificate with seal (renderWarrantyCertificate).

label: Certificate of Completion
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('certificate_of_completion') — generates a job-completion verification (renderCertificateOfCompletion) with 2 required signers.

label: Supplement Request
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('supplement_request') — generates an itemized supplement with codes/quantities/justification (renderSupplementRequest).

label: Scope of Work
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('scope_of_work') — generates a 7-section scope (renderScopeOfWork) with 2 required signers.

label: Inspection Report (Insurance)
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('inspectionInsurance') — generates an insurance-formatted damage assessment with photo zones (renderInspectionInsurance).

label: Assignment of Benefits (AOB)
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('assignment_of_benefits') — generates a legal AOB (renderAssignmentOfBenefits) with 2 required signers.

label: Change Order
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('change_order') — generates a contract modification with added/removed items and revised totals.

label: Roofing Contract
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('contract') — generates a full legal contract (renderContract) with terms/warranty/signature blocks + 2 required signers.

label: Work Authorization
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('work_authorization') — generates a homeowner work authorization with access instructions and cancellation notice.

label: Payment Agreement
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('payment_agreement') — generates a payment schedule (deposit/progress/final) with accepted methods.

label: Material Delivery Notice
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('material_delivery') — generates a delivery notice with material list, date, and homeowner instructions.

label: Thank You Letter
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('thank_you') — generates a post-project letter with warranty reminder, maintenance tips, referral ask.

label: Company One-Pager
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('company_intro') — generates a full-color marketing one-pager with services, testimonials, financing CTA.

label: Financing Options Sheet
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('financing_options') — generates an Improvifi financing-plans sheet with monthly payment breakdowns and application steps.

label: Inspection Report (Homeowner)
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('inspectionHomeowner') — generates a sales-focused inspection report (renderInspectionHomeowner) with condition grades + 2 required signers.

label: Storm Damage Checklist
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('storm_checklist') — generates a printable 5-section storm-damage checklist.

label: Insurance Claim Process Guide
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('claim_guide') — generates a 7-step claim-process walkthrough with FAQs.

label: Referral Card
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('referral_card') — generates a postcard-style referral card with reward-program details and 3-step process.

label: Before & After Report
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('before_after_report') — generates visual project documentation with before/after photo grids and highlights.

label: Door Hanger
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('door_hanger') — generates a print-ready 'We're in your neighborhood' door hanger with free-inspection offer.

label: Neighborhood Mailer
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('neighborhood_mailer') — generates a targeted neighborhood mailer with referral CTA.

label: Customer Testimonial Sheet
expected_behavior: NBDDocGen.fillAndGenerate('testimonial_sheet') — generates a social-proof sheet with 4 reviews, star ratings, satisfaction stats.

selector: .tl-doc-row button[title="Print a blank copy to fill by hand"]
label: Blank
expected_behavior: JS-injected per-row button; stopPropagation then lazy-loads docgen bundle and calls NBDDocGen.generateBlank(type) to produce a printable empty copy of that template.
notes: Injected at runtime before each .tl-doc-arrow; repeats once per template row (24 instances). One representative entry. NOTE: injector matches legacy inline onclick=fillAndGenerate(...) via getAttribute('onclick') — rows now use data-action=docgen, so this regex may no longer match (potential bug: Blank buttons may not inject).

label: Open Pipeline →
expected_behavior: goTo('crm') routes to the pipeline so the rep can pick a lead to attach uploads to (per-lead upload lives on customer.html).
notes: Empty-state CTA inside Uploaded Documents panel.

label: ✕ Cancel
expected_behavior: closeModal('uploadDoc') (closeUploadDoc) hides #docUploadArea (display:none).
notes: Inline upload area, hidden until Upload clicked.

label: Document Name
expected_behavior: Free-text field for the upload's display name; read by saveDocUpload() when uploading.

label: Category (Contract/Supplement/Scope of Work/Photo Report/Insurance Correspondence/Other)
expected_behavior: Selects the upload's category; read by saveDocUpload() and stored on the doc record.

label: Click to select file (PDF, DOC, JPG)
expected_behavior: clickProxy delegate forwards the click to the hidden #docFileInput, opening the OS file picker.

label: (hidden file input)
expected_behavior: On change, handleDocUpload(el) stores files[0] in _docFile and toasts 'File selected: <name>'. Accepts .pdf,.doc,.docx,.jpg,.jpeg,.png.

label: Upload Document
expected_behavior: saveDocUpload() uploads the selected file (with name + category) to the lead's documents store.
notes: Inline upload area submit. NOTE: this Documents view has no lead context, so saveDocUpload may need a lead binding (empty-state text says uploads are per-lead on customer.html).

label: Auto-fill from Lead
expected_behavior: On change calls window._docgenAutoFill(leadId), which populates the modal's text/textarea fields from the selected CRM lead's data (customer-data autofill).
reveal_state: modal:docgenFillModal (after a docgen template row click)
notes: Built dynamically by the fill-modal builder; key autofill control.

label: (per-template fill fields: text/textarea/select)
expected_behavior: Dynamically built input/textarea/select per template field (required marked with *); values read by _docgenSubmit on Generate. Some fields prefilled by _docgenAutoFill.
reveal_state: modal:docgenFillModal (after a docgen template row click)
notes: Representative entry for the variable per-template field set; count/labels depend on selected doc type.

label: × / Cancel (close fill modal)
expected_behavior: data-dg-action closeFillModal removes #docgenFillModal from the DOM (abandons generation).
reveal_state: modal:docgenFillModal (after a docgen template row click)
notes: Two instances (header × + footer Cancel); same action.

label: Generate Document
expected_behavior: data-dg-action submit → window._docgenSubmit(documentType): validates required fields, collects field values, then runs NBDDocGen generate (server render or client HTML) and opens the result in NBDDocViewer.
reveal_state: modal:docgenFillModal (after a docgen template row click)
notes: Primary generate action; data-dg-id carries the template key.

label: 💾 Save to Customer
expected_behavior: NBDDocViewer handleSave(): persists the generated doc to a chosen customer/lead record (via onSave or a default save path).
notes: Doc-viewer action bar (separate NBDDocViewer surface but reachable from the docs generate flow).

label: ✉ Email
expected_behavior: NBDDocViewer handleEmail(): opens a mailto: link with the document link prefilled.
notes: Opens mail client (no server send) — boundary only.

label: 🖨 Print
expected_behavior: NBDDocViewer handlePrint(): calls the preview iframe's contentWindow.print().

label: 📄 Download PDF
expected_behavior: NBDDocViewer handlePdf(): renders the doc to PDF client-side via html2pdf.js and triggers a file download.
notes: Doc-viewer action bar; primary Download path.

label: ✍️ Send for Signature
expected_behavior: NBDDocViewer handleSendForSignature(): prompts for the homeowner email (validated), then calls onSendForSignature → createSignRequest callable which mints a doc_sign_tokens link and emails it. CHARGE/SEND boundary — stop at the email prompt.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (doc generated AND doc is signable + tied to a lead; hidden by default, open() unhides)
notes: Remote-signing boundary control. Only revealed for signable docs (proposal/contract/scope_of_work/AOB/cert-of-completion/inspectionHomeowner etc.) tied to a lead. Drive only to the email prompt.

label: Clear
expected_behavior: signature-widget: clears the signature pad canvas for that signer block.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (interactive signable doc rendered with nbd-sig blocks inside the viewer)
notes: In-doc canvas signature control; repeats once per signer block.

label: Undo last stroke
expected_behavior: signature-widget: removes the last drawn stroke from that signer's pad.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (interactive signable doc rendered with nbd-sig blocks inside the viewer)
notes: In-doc canvas signature control; repeats per signer block.

label: Use saved
expected_behavior: signature-widget: applies this lead's previously-saved signature image to the pad (one-tap reuse), marking the pad signed.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (only injected when this lead has a saved signature for the role and the block isn't finalized)
notes: Conditionally injected per signer block; PR3b saved-sig reuse.

label: Print / Save PDF
expected_behavior: Legacy popup-window action bar (fallback when NBDDocViewer isn't loaded): data-dg-action print calls window.print() in the popup.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (only on the legacy window.open() fallback path)
notes: Fallback path only — reached when NBDDocViewer is unavailable.

label: ← Close
expected_behavior: Legacy popup action bar: data-dg-action closeWindow calls window.close() on the doc popup.
reveal_state: after:d5-docs-045 (only on the legacy window.open() fallback path)
